message:
test(robot,pool): add 35 tests for format dispatch, envelope builder, and DB recovery

robot.rs (+15):
- is_prose_command: thread/message true, status/inbox/outbox/empty false, case sensitivity
- resolve_format: explicit overrides, prose→Markdown, terminal fallback
- format_output: JSON validity, TOON non-empty, Markdown→TOON fallback
- RobotEnvelope: alert/action population, meta command, chaining

pool.rs (+20):
- auto_pool_size: bounds validation (10≤min≤50, 50≤max≤200, min≤max)
- is_corruption_error_message: 4 positive patterns, case insensitivity, 6 negatives, embedded match
- is_sqlite_recovery_error_message: all corruption + OOM, cursor, unwrap, internal; negatives
- sqlite_absolute_fallback_path: memory, absolute, dot-relative, dotdot-relative, non-recovery, missing
- ensure_sqlite_parent_dir_exists: memory noop, creates nested dirs, ok when exists
- open_sqlite_file_with_recovery: memory, file, parent dir creation
- DbPoolConfig::from_env: defaults don't panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
